title: Warhammer Fantasy Mod
description: Fantasy Warhammer Mod, added weapons, dwarf villages in mountains also underground, Skaven and Pegasus
body:
Description

This Mod has the aim of bringing the Warhammer Universe to minecraft. The mods brings weapons from the universe, creatures and structures.

Go on an adventure on top of a Pegasus, fighting new enemies with new weapons.
![Flying on top of a Pegasus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xahvYN5k/images/16a9e9bc64b5fb506575573989e03b7a71b1603b_350.webp)
![Skaven Patrol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xahvYN5k/images/a874c35611301bdbb3bd504ce05c4183aaf181f2_350.webp)

Discover new Dwarf Villages in the mountains, both above and underground.
![Dwarf Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c060991626f01c6ac799a29eab3713a7a2353142_0.webp)
![Underground Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e54e7d217ba0b8829c9043d6a7086ee5e2e14e56_0.webp)

(see Warhammer wiki on fandom for some lore https://warhammerfantasy.fandom.com/wiki/Warhammer_Wiki )

![Melee Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d5addf90ca60198d6f7ac7a8dc844062fb68a48.png)

The basic weapons you can craft:

  - Warhammer (heavy hitter, but slow attack speed)

  - Spear (less damage than a sword but faster attack speed + can be thrown)

  - Knife (few damage but fast attack speed (could be useful against baby zombies))

  - Halberd(slower than a sword but hits harder, has a right click  attack with an extended reach) 

 ![Ranged Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37b9532dbec0f4d907521a560de3152389cd89e9.png)

The Ranged Weapons you can craft:

-sling: just a sling allow you to throw cobblestone

-Flintlock Pistol(reloads faster but deal less damage)

-Musket (stronger than a bow but slower to fire)

-Blunderbuss(deadly at close range but loses damage rapidly at a distance).

-Grenade Launcher(takes grenades as ammo, punch  increases explosion size, power increases the velocity of the projectile)

-Gunsword (sword and a pistol at the same time)

-Nuln Repeater Rifle (same as a musket but times 6 (thus also takes a longer time to reload)

Special Weapons:
![Special weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfdf5eca0f53bad3f5c32eb6885bc0fc5f63f793.png)

In the mountains you might encounter Dwarves, but be careful those little guys don't like it when they are attacked, and they know how to fight. Moreover, they have their own unique trades with new items:

-Beer: a good drink that gives you bonuses, but drink with moderation

-Thunderer Handgun: a powerful and robust musket

-Grudgeraker: a 2 shot and robust blunderbuss

-Drakegun: a powerful flamethrower 

-WarPick: a strong pick that can even be used effectively in melee

-Ghal Maraz: difficult to get but a Legendary very strong weapon.

the Farmer: like a normal farmer but sells beer.

the Miner: sells you minerals(including quartz),sells minecarts,golden rails,TNT,...) but also a war pick.

the Builder: sells you non renewable blocks(clay,red sandstone,quartz) 

the Lord : a rare villager whi will donate, after a succesful raid, the legendary Ghal Maraz the most powerful warhammer know who buff you in combat. It is spawned from other dwarves that are master traders.

the Engineer: sells you everything you need for your gunpowder weapons, including 2 special ranged weapons and just in case you need it diamond chainmail armor. 

the Slayer: buys cooked meat and sells mob heads.

![Family Picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a853f0f14f928442a804d65f3a7f3de60b8f1483.png)


 Tradable armor:
 ![Diamond Chainmail Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7f47936d92bafe543606649fe2449008664e6e.png)

Deep under the ground are lurking the rat-like creatures of the Skaven. These twisted creatures bring dangerous warpstone powered weapons, you might be able to steal there equipment from them if you manage to kill them.

 

In the mountains you might also be able to find a pegasus and tame it: this mighty steed will allow you to fly through the air. in stationary mode: flies slowly but  it can stay "stationary" in the air and climb fast and a "elytra" mode: where it fly fast in the air and can remain at a high speed. (double press spacebar to change mode.

 

You can also craft yourself some new shields with their own unique properties: the long elven shields allow you to block shots while aiming with a gun, while the other small shields allow you to run while using the shield.


For info:

from the version 1.21 you can obtain a description book by pressing the button
